item.title: The Whiplash of Trump’s Iran Capitulation
item.description: America’s foreign policy is about one man and little else.
item.dc:creator: Tom Nichols

item.title: Don’t Overestimate the Pink Tide
item.description: Democratic socialists aren’t taking over America.
item.dc:creator: Adam Serwer

item.title: Burnham Is Britain’s Last Chance Before Farage
item.description: If he becomes prime minister, he has three years to fix the country.
item.dc:creator: Idrees Kahloon

item.title: War and Consequences
item.description: The damage will not be undone when the Trump administration is gone.
item.dc:creator: Eliot A. Cohen

item.title: SpaceX Just Needs the Money
item.description: What this year of humongous IPOs says about the tech industry
item.dc:creator: James Surowiecki

item.title: The Man Who Couldn’t Do It
item.description: Keir Starmer joins the growing list of prime ministers who failed to address the country’s troubles.
item.dc:creator: Helen Lewis

item.title: What Happened to Tony Carruthers Is Horrifying
item.description: Lethal injection was meant to be humane. The reality is bloody and brutal.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Bruenig

item.title: This Founding Father Died in Disgrace. But He Can’t Be Forgotten.
item.description: Excluded from America’s origin story, James Wilson may have been the most influential, prescient, and democratic drafter of the Constitution.
item.dc:creator: Jesse Wegman

item.title: The Wall the Tohono O’odham Don’t Want
item.description: Trump threatens Native sovereignty in Arizona.
item.dc:creator: Geraldo L. Cadava
